name: Limousines By Mr Mel Inc
districts_or_customers: Unknown; no school district contracts identified

fit_notes: Micro limousine operator at 6309 Nolensville Pike, Nashville. No evidence of yellow-school-bus or contracted student transport service. Too small (~4 employees, ~$284K revenue) and wrong service line to be a viable Summit tuck-in.

name: Lino Transportation
districts_or_customers: Not identified; Elk Grove USD handles its own/contracted student transport
fit_notes: 4-employee operator in Elk Grove with no detectable web presence. Likely a paratransit/livery micro-business, not a yellow-bus contractor. Too small to move the needle for Summit; pass.

fit_notes: Sole-proprietor limousine service at a Watt Ave mailbox suite in Antelope (Sacramento area). No school bus or district contract footprint. Not a tuck-in candidate.
